intro: Brachypeza cladostachya, also known as Himalayan club moss, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. Traditional medicine has long utilized Brachypeza cladostachya for its health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of various conditions such as arthritis and respiratory disorders.
